solutions.solution: Let us consider the two adjacent bent lines as a pair. Then, in each figure except (d), there are two straight lines between the bent pair and the remaining bent line when the direction of bent is considered.
Except figure (d), in all the figures, middle of square is open that touches the blank box.
Except figure (c), in all the figures, both the inside and outside figures are similar but differ in size.
Except figure (c), in all the figures, top and bottom figures are mirror images of one another.
Only figure (d) does not contain any element present in the interior of the closed figure.

In all figure, except (a) the line attached to the corner of figure is facing outside the figure but in figure (a) it is inside the figure. Based on the classification explained above, there can be two types of questions which are asked in exams.
